Boundary

The boundary of this geometry. A polygon's boundary is a polyline. A polyline's boundary is a multipoint. A point or multipoint's boundary is an empty point or multipoint.

virtual IGeometry Boundary { get; }

Returns

IGeometry

ClipToDomain()

Clips the geometry to the domain of the spatial reference. Useful for ensuring that buffers can be fit within the spatial domain of the feature class to which they are being added.

virtual void ClipToDomain()

<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> ConstructPoint3D(x, y,
z);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint3D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
z)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint2D(x, y);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
point.Z = z;<br>
<br>
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
return</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}<br>
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break">
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break"></span></p>

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

<span style=

point.PutCoords(x, y);<br>

Equals(IGeometry) 

virtual bool Equals(IGeometry other)

Parameters

other IGeometry

Returns

bool

ExtrapolateMs(esriExtrapolationEnum, int, int, int, int)

Extrapolates the Ms at one or both ends of the geometry based on the M interval between the fromIndex and the toIndex.

virtual void ExtrapolateMs(esriExtrapolationEnum extrapolationStyle, int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExtrapolateMs3D(esriExtrapolationEnum, int, int, int, int)

Extrapolates the Ms at one or both ends of the geometry based on the M interval between the fromIndex and the toIndex.

virtual void ExtrapolateMs3D(esriExtrapolationEnum extrapolationStyle, int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromPoint

The 'from' point of the curve.

virtual IPoint FromPoint { get; set; }

Returns

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

Generalize(double)

Generalizes this polycurve using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm.

virtual void Generalize(double maxAllowableOffset)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffset double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Generalize3D(double)

Generalizes this polycurve using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm.

virtual void Generalize3D(double maxAllowableOffset)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffset double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoNormalize()

Shifts longitudes, if need be, into a continuous range of 360 degrees.

virtual void GeoNormalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoNormalizeEx(ISpatialReference, double) 

virtual void GeoNormalizeEx(ISpatialReference SR, double denseDistance)

Parameters

SR ISpatialReference
denseDistance double

GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double)

Normalizes longitudes into a continuous range containing the longitude. This method is obsolete.

virtual void GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeodesicDensify(double) 

virtual void GeodesicDensify(double maxSegmentLength)

Parameters

maxSegmentLength double

GeometriesChanged()

Tells this geometry collection that some of its geometries have been altered. Use this method on polylines, polygons and multipatches after directly editing one of its parts.

virtual void GeometriesChanged()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry[int]

A reference to the ith geometry.

virtual IGeometry Geometry[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Returns

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryCount

The number of geometries in this collection.

virtual int GeometryCount { get; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryType

The type of this geometry.

virtual esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryType

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetClassID(out Guid) 

virtual void GetClassID(out Guid pClassID)

Parameters

pClassID Guid

GetDistancesAtM(bool, double)

Returns an array of distances along the polyline at which is located the specified M. If the geometry's M's are monotonic along the geometry then the array will only have one element.

virtual object GetDistancesAtM(bool asRatio, double M)

Parameters

asRatio bool
M double

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetDistancesAtM3D(bool, double)

Returns an array of 3D distances along the polyline at which is located the specified M. If the geometry's M's are monotonic along the geometry then the array will only have one element.

virtual object GetDistancesAtM3D(bool asRatio, double M)

Parameters

asRatio bool
M double

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetMsAtDistance(double, bool)

Returns M values at the distance along the geometry. An array of one or two Ms is returned. Two Ms can be returned if the given distance is exactly at the beginning or ending of a part.

virtual object GetMsAtDistance(double distance, bool asRatio)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetMsAtDistance3D(double, bool)

Returns M values at the 3D distance along the geometry. An array of one or two Ms is returned. Two Ms can be returned if the given distance is exactly at the beginning or ending of a part.

virtual object GetMsAtDistance3D(double distance, bool asRatio)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetNormalsAtM(double, double)

Returns a geometry bag of line segments corresponding to the normal at the locations along the geometry where the specified M occurs.

virtual IGeometryCollection GetNormalsAtM(double M, double Length)

Parameters

M double
Length double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetPoints(int, int, out IPoint) 

virtual void GetPoints(int Index, int Count, out IPoint Points)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
Points IPoint

Returns a multipoint geometry corresponding to the locations along the geometry where the specified M occurs.

virtual IGeometryCollection GetPointsAtM(double M, double lateralOffset)

M double
lateralOffset double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Indicates if this segment collection contains segments other than lines.

Sample Snippet

HitTest(IPoint, double, esriGeometryHitPartType, IPoint, ref double, ref int, ref int, ref bool) 

virtual bool HitTest(IPoint QueryPoint, double searchRadius, esriGeometryHitPartType geometryPart, IPoint hitPoint, ref double hitDistance, ref int hitPartIndex, ref int hitSegmentIndex, ref bool bRightSide)

Parameters

QueryPoint IPoint
searchRadius double
geometryPart esriGeometryHitPartType
hitPoint IPoint
hitDistance double

"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
<img src="./bitmaps/point.gif" align="baseline"></span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">public</span> <span style="COLOR: blue">static</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
GetPointGeometry()</span></span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint3D(x, y, z);</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
MakeZAware(point <span style="COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>);</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> point <span style=
"COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint3D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
z)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint2D(x, y);</span></p>

"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">

<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>

<span style=

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

PointIDSimple

virtual bool PointIDSimple { get; }

Returns

bool

Simplify()

Makes this geometry topologically correct.

virtual void Simplify()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SimplifyAsFeature()

Simplifies the geometry using the rules appropriate for this feature.

virtual void SimplifyAsFeature()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SimplifyEx(bool)

Use either planar or network simplify regardless of current attribute awareness.

virtual void SimplifyEx(bool planarSimplify)

Parameters

planarSimplify bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SimplifyNetwork()

Removes zero length segments (zero in 2 dimensions), merges parts at endpoints that only connect to each other, reorients segments that are pointing against the prevailing orientation for a part.

virtual void SimplifyNetwork()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Smooth(double)

Converts this curve into a smooth curve containing only Bezier curve segments.

virtual void Smooth(double maxAllowableOffset)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffset double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Snap()

Snaps ms to the precision of the spatial reference associated with the geometry. M snapping does not happen automatically as part of calling IGeometry::SnapToSpatialReference.

virtual void Snap()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SnapToSpatialReference()

Moves points of this geometry so that they can be represented in the precision of the geometry's associated spatial reference system.

virtual void SnapToSpatialReference()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference associated with this geometry.

virtual ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

SplitAtDistance(double, bool, bool, out bool, out int, out int)

Introduces a new vertex into this polyline at a specified distance from the beginning of the polyline.

virtual void SplitAtDistance(double distance, bool asRatio, bool createPart, out bool SplitHappened, out int newPartIndex, out int newSegmentIndex)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool
createPart bool
SplitHappened bool
newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

SynchronizeEmptyAttributes()

If, at end point shared by two segments, one segment has an empty value for an attribute and the other has a non-empty value, use the non-empty value for both.

virtual void SynchronizeEmptyAttributes()

UpdateAllMsByMs(IPoint, double, double, bool) 

virtual void UpdateAllMsByMs(IPoint Origin, double Scale, double Offset, bool ignoreGaps)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
Scale double
Offset double
ignoreGaps bool

UpdateMsByDistance(int, int, int, int, double, double, int, bool)

Updates Ms along the shortest path between the specified endpoints. The interpolation ratio is determined by the input ms and euclidean distance along that path. The update method is given as a combination of esriGeometryUpdateMEnum values.

virtual void UpdateMsByDistance(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint, double fromM, double toM, int updateHow, bool ignoreGaps)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int
fromM double
toM double
updateHow int
ignoreGaps bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateMsByMs(int, int, int, int, double, double, int)

Updates Ms along the shortest path between the specified endpoints. The interpolation ratio is determined by the existing ms along that path and the input ms. The update method is given as a combination of esriGeometryUpdateMEnum values.

virtual void UpdateMsByMs(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint, double fromM, double toM, int updateHow)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int
fromM double
toM double
updateHow int

Examples

Sample Snippet

virtual void UpdatePoint(int i, IPoint p)

Parameters

i int
p IPoint

Weed(double)

Generalizes using a small tolerance based upon either the system units of the geometry's spatial reference, or the geometry's bounding box.

virtual void Weed(double maxAllowableOffsetFactor)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffsetFactor double

Examples

maxAllowableOffsetFactor double

ZVertical
